name: Elena Vasquez
title: Founder & Creative Director
bio: Elena opened Aura after fifteen years between Madrid and New York, including six on the color floor at a Bumble and bumble flagship. She teaches an annual hand-painting workshop for early-career colorists and still takes her own clients three days a week.

name: Marcus Okafor
title: Master Stylist
bio: Marcus trained in London under a Vidal Sassoon-lineage cutter before moving stateside in 2019. His chair runs heavy with curly clients who want a real shape, not just a wash-and-go. He keeps a small bridal book each summer.

name: Priya Shah
title: Senior Colorist
bio: Priya is the colorist clients send their friends to when something has gone wrong elsewhere. She's especially careful with dark hair that's been over-lightened, and she keeps a strict consult policy: nothing happens at the bowl until the plan is on paper.

name: Naomi Tanaka
title: Lead Skincare Therapist
bio: Naomi is a licensed esthetician with advanced training in microcurrent and chemical peels. She came to Aura from a dermatology practice in San Francisco, where she worked alongside the resident MDs on post-procedure recovery facials.

name: Theo Laurent
title: Senior Massage Therapist
bio: Theo holds a 1000-hour California license plus continuing certifications in pre-natal and sports massage. He works with several local runners and dancers, and his deep-tissue clients tend to book him on a standing six-week rotation.

name: Jules Moreau
title: Nail Specialist
bio: Jules came up through a Paris nail studio that specialized in editorial work and brought that obsessive prep standard with them. Expect a careful dry cuticle, a clean apex, and gel that lasts the full three weeks.
